trial_type.Description: Category of the trial presented to the participant.

Levels.FIXCROSS: Fixation cross display; no auditory stimuli were presented.
Levels.MELODY: Presentation of a short musical excerpt delivered auditorily to the participant that occupies the full duration of the trial.
Levels.SILENCE: Silence period during which no auditory stimuli were presented.

stim_name.Description: Filename of the musical stimulus presented during the trial. Stimuli originate from the publicly available dataset by Clemente, A., Vila-Vidal, M., Pearce, M.T. et al. A set of 200 musical stimuli varying in balance, contour, symmetry, and complexity, with behavioral and computational assessments.
